params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-19: mistral_jsonpatch_v3 envelope verification. Major rewrite from #596 fix: switched from flat {type:message, message:{}} wrapper to RFC 6902 JSON Patch wrapper {type:message, messageId, messageVersion, patches:[{op,path,value}]} per #597 ground truth. 29-field message object with content empty + contentChunks[0].text holding warning. chatId extracted from POST /api/chat request body via {{REQUEST_BODY:chatId}} token. parentId set to null (assumption: client tolerates null parentId for stream-injected message). createdAt hardcoded to 2026-04-27T07:35:51.618Z. Both reload_templates + reload_services succeeded. Goal: verify Error 6002 fallback is gone, warning text rendered in chat bubble.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Open chat.mistral.ai (guest mode OK; can use existing chat or create new)
5. SUCCESS criteria: chat shows our warning text ('[경고]' or '민감' or '보안')
6. PARTIAL criteria — Error 6002 GONE but text not visible: envelope wrapper now correct, but content/parentId/timestamps may need adjustment
7. PARTIAL criteria — Error 6002 STILL: wrapper still mismatches OR parentId=null rejected
8. FAIL criteria: Stage 1 path got intercepted somehow / bypass / connection failed
9. Network /api/chat response → Response tab → confirm full envelope body with 16:/15:/8: lines + JSON Patch shape

notes: Cycle 94 R-19 mistral_jsonpatch_v3 verification — 2nd attempt at fixing Error 6002 with full RFC 6902 wrapper rewrite.
